name: fourth-firecrawl
description: Fourth-tailored fork of the Firecrawl Claude plugin, rebuilt MCP-first for Claude Cowork. Ships task-oriented skills for competitor intelligence, hospitality market scans, content gap analysis, and staged KB ingestion into Fourth Marketing Brain. Bundles curated source catalogs (R365, HCM, NRN, FSR, Skift) and pre-built extraction schemas. Uses your Cowork-registered Firecrawl connector — the plugin no longer declares its own MCP, so it cooperates cleanly with the workspace-level connector and your per-user Bearer auth.
